---
title: "Index des outils"
toc: false
---

Vue d'ensemble de tous les outils référencés dans PHARE, organisés par catégorie.

---

## Interactions médicamenteuses

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="interactions.html#thésaurus-ansm" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/ansm.png" alt="ANSM">
<span>Thésaurus ANSM</span>
</a>

<a href="interactions.html#hedrine" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/hedrine.png" alt="Hedrine">
<span>Hedrine</span>
</a>

<a href="interactions.html#mskcc-herbs" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/mskcc.png" alt="MSKCC Herbs">
<span>MSKCC Herbs</span>
</a>

<a href="interactions.html#ddi-predictor" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/ddi-predictor.png" alt="DDI Predictor">
<span>DDI Predictor</span>
</a>

<a href="interactions.html#supercypspred" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/supercyps.png" alt="SuperCYPsPred">
<span>SuperCYPsPred</span>
</a>

<a href="interactions.html#covid-19-drug-interactions" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/liverpool.png" alt="COVID-19 Drug Interactions">
<span>COVID-19 Drug Interactions</span>
</a>

<a href="interactions.html#recos-paxlovid-sfpt" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/sfpt.png" alt="Recos Paxlovid">
<span>Recos Paxlovid</span>
</a>

</div>

---

## Adaptation thérapeutique

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="adaptation.html#liste-préférentielle-sujet-âgé-omedit" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/omedit.png" alt="OMEDIT">
<span>Liste préférentielle sujet âgé</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#stoppstart-v3" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/stopp.png" alt="STOPP/START">
<span>STOPP/START v3</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#psychopharma" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/psychopharma.png" alt="Psychopharma">
<span>Psychopharma</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#psychiatrienet" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/psychiatrienet.png" alt="Psychiatrienet">
<span>Psychiatrienet</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#abxbmi" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/abxbmi.png" alt="ABXBMI">
<span>ABXBMI</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#adaptobese" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/adaptobese.png" alt="Adaptobese">
<span>Adaptobese</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#gpr" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/vidal.png" alt="GPR Vidal">
<span>GPR — Vidal</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#rx-cirrhose" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/rxcirrhose.png" alt="Rx Cirrhose">
<span>Rx Cirrhose</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#pimcheck" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/pimcheck.png" alt="PIMCheck">
<span>PIMCheck</span>
</a>

<a href="adaptation.html#swisspeddose" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/swisspeddose.png" alt="SwissPedDose">
<span>SwissPedDose</span>
</a>

</div>

---

## Iatrogénie

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="iatrogenic.html#ditma" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/ditma.png" alt="DITMA">
<span>DITMA</span>
</a>

<a href="iatrogenic.html#livertox" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/livertox.png" alt="LiverTox">
<span>LiverTox</span>
</a>

<a href="iatrogenic.html#crat" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/crat.png" alt="CRAT">
<span>CRAT</span>
</a>

<a href="iatrogenic.html#credible-meds" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/crediblemeds.png" alt="Credible Meds">
<span>Credible Meds</span>
</a>

<a href="iatrogenic.html#pneumotox" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/pneumotox.png" alt="Pneumotox">
<span>Pneumotox</span>
</a>

</div>

---

## Compatibilité

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="compatibilite.html#stabilis" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/stabilis.png" alt="Stabilis">
<span>Stabilis</span>
</a>

</div>

---

## Recommandations

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="recommandations.html#palliaguide" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/palliaguide.png" alt="Palliaguide">
<span>Palliaguide</span>
</a>

</div>

---

## Éducation thérapeutique

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="etp.html#onconormandie" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/onconormandie.png" alt="OncoNormandie">
<span>OncoNormandie</span>
</a>

<a href="etp.html#zephir-splf" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/splf.png" alt="ZEPHIR">
<span>ZEPHIR</span>
</a>

</div>

---

## Pharmacologie

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="pharmacologie.html#pharmacomedicale-cnpm" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/pharmacomedicale.png" alt="Pharmacomedicale">
<span>Pharmacomedicale</span>
</a>

</div>

---

## Conversion d'unités

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="conversions.html#médicalcul" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/medicalcul.png" alt="Médicalcul">
<span>Médicalcul</span>
</a>

<a href="conversions.html#opioconvert" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/opioconvert.png" alt="Opioconvert">
<span>Opioconvert</span>
</a>

</div>

---

## Ruptures de stock

<div class="index-grid">

<a href="ruptures.html#vigirupture-ansm" class="index-card">
<img src="images/logos/vigirupture.png" alt="Vigirupture">
<span>Vigirupture</span>
</a>

</div>
